decision: Collected Phase 2 green reliability sample window.
summary: Added semantic verifier fixture benchmark with 21 labeled cases, recorded zero critical false allows and zero risk misclassifications, and summarized the first green sample window without crossing excluded categories.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to phase2.gate-c-review; Gate C can now evaluate the green sample window and semantic benchmark evidence.
